title: Conquest of Just Enough Items
description: Conquest compatibility pack for the Just Enough Items mod
body:
## Just Enough Items - Conquest compatibility pack

This pack retextures Just Enough Items mod's GUI to fit with the Conquest_ texture-pack and the Conquest Reforged mod.

![JEI GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QwMSNUGe/images/4d653cee2bad46f278ff63040ffea6fed6a2a31d.jpeg)
